results.name: the first (ffxiv)
results.description: A shard of the source, primarily featured in the Shadowbringers expansion.

results.name: theft
results.description: Effects that let you steal cards and resources from your opponent.

results.name: the great wave off kanagawa
results.description: Homages to the famous 1831 ukiyo-e woodblock print from Hokusai's "Thirty-six Views of Mount Fuji"

results.name: the horned halo
results.description: An artifact capable of creating fallen angels.

results.name: the immortal sun
results.description: A binding device on Ixalan created by Azor. It trapped planeswalkers inside the plane.

results.name: the maelstrom
results.description: The maelstrom at the heart of Alara where its shards met.

results.name: the master (doctor who)
results.description: A villainous Time Lord. The Doctor's arch-nemesis.

results.name: themis
results.description: The character Themis from Final Fantasy XIV, also known as their title of "Elidibus"

results.name: the moment
results.description: A sentient weapon of mass destruction used to destroy the planet Gallifrey at the end of the Time War.

results.name: the monumental facade
results.description: The topmost layer of New Phyrexia, forming the outer surface of the reconstructed plane.

results.name: the muse
results.description: A rock formation at Spectacle Summit.

results.name: théoden
results.description: King of Rohan in The Lord of the Rings

results.name: the pandorica
results.description: A legendary prison said to contain the most dangerous creature in the universe.

results.name: theros
results.description: A plane inspired by Greek mythology.

results.name: the scorched forest (avatar)
results.description: The burned-down forest that [Hei Bai](hei-bai) cared for in Avatar: The Last Airbender.
